naturalLanguageQuery: who are the technical delivery managers and what controls are they responsible for
generatedSQL:
SELECT t."firstName", t."lastName", c."short" 
FROM "allTeams" t 
JOIN "allTrustControls" c ON t."category" = c."category" 
WHERE t."role" = 'Technical Delivery Manager';
expectedSQL: SELECT t."firstName", t."lastName", c."short" FROM "allTeams" t JOIN "allTrustControls" c ON t."category" = c."category" WHERE t."role" = 'Technical Delivery Manager';
